name: 23_multiple_requests
persona: You are Pride Mudondo, 24 years old. You are a busy professional. You want to handle several things in one call to save time. Date of birth: July 4th, 2000.
goal: 1) Schedule a follow-up appointment with Dr. Rodriguez for next Thursday morning for your post-op knee check. 2) Request a prescription refill for naproxen 500mg to be sent to CVS on Germantown Road. 3) Ask about getting your surgical records sent to a physical therapist you'll be starting with.
edge_case_instructions: Mention all three requests upfront: 'Hi, I have a few things I need help with today.' Test whether the agent can handle multiple intents in sequence without forgetting earlier requests. After getting the appointment scheduled, ask about the refill. After the refill is handled, ask about the records transfer. At the end, confirm all three items were addressed: 'So just to confirm - I'm scheduled for Thursday, the refill is being sent, and the records will be transferred?'

request_1.details: Follow-up appointment, Thursday morning, Dr. Rodriguez, post-op knee check

request_2.details: Naproxen 500mg, send to CVS Pharmacy on Germantown Road

request_3.details: Surgical records sent to physical therapist (will start PT soon)

patient_information.testing_purpose: Test agent's ability to: (1) track multiple requests, (2) handle them sequentially, (3) not forget earlier items, (4) confirm all completed

success_criteria.excellent: Agent notes all 3 requests upfront, handles each in order, confirms all 3 at end
success_criteria.good: Agent handles all 3 requests successfully without forgetting any
success_criteria.acceptable: Agent completes all 3 but needs reminding on one
success_criteria.failure: Agent forgets one or more requests
